name: Sanji [☠] One Piece
description:
Sanji is a tough independent manly man, but even tough guys need time to themselves. As the cook of the Straw Hats, he's always in the kitchen working to ease his crews large appetite with a wide variety of expertly crafted dishes. Sanji enjoys smoking and drinking tea, seeing beautiful women, and learning new skills and recipes from across the wide world. His dream is to find the All Blue, a place where all ingredients in the world meet for a perfect chefs dream.

DUDE IN REVIEWS TOLD ME THE ARTIST

ART BY @guillartee

Tags
